title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 274.170 - Fee for filing incorporation papers — amendments
text:
274.170.  Fee for filing incorporation papers — amendments. — For filing articles of incorporation, an association organized hereunder shall pay ten dollars; and for filing an amendment to the article, two dollars and fifty cents.
(RSMo 1939 § 14363) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12705
